creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Enrico M. Crisostomo from comment #1)

Add secteam to CC.

For maintainer, the following warnings were seen during QA but they did not seem to impact the final product or build on all platforms.

# portlint -ac
WARN: /usr/ports/sysutils/logstash/pkg-plist: [6638]: installing shared libraries, please define USE_LDCONFIG as appropriate
